entities.name: ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_CONDITION
entities.description: 枚举类型(定义在activitycoordinator.h中)，表示支持的一组条件

entities.name: ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_NOTIFICATION
entities.description: 参数notification指示活动应停止/暂停还是启动/恢复的ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_NOTIFICATION枚举值。callbackContext提供创建订阅时给定的上下文。

entities.name: ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_RESOURCE
entities.description: 枚 举 (activitycoordinatortypes.h) 项目2024/06/12 支持的一组资源的枚举。

parameters.name: Resource
parameters.description: 要检查支持 ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_RESOURCE 类型。

return_value.description: 返回一个 BOOL 值，该值指示当前系统上是否支持该资源。

entities.remarks: 应用程序编译的活动协调器版本可能与运行时系统上的版本不同。应用程序需要使用提供的API检查资源可用性，并根据需要调整其程序。这使应用程序能够区分缺少功能支持和将无效参数传递给API。开发人员应记住，活动协调器资源支持并不指示系统中是否存在此类资源。可以在运行时添加和删除GPU和NPU等设备，开发人员应参考他们使用的库或框架，了解如何最好地处理此类情况。由于活动协调器无法控制工作运行的方式或时间，因此开发人员必须小心创建反映其应用程序如何使用资源的策略。例如，如果在图形处理单元(GPU)上运行工作，当不存在NPU时，开发人员应创建同时监视或根据需要在基于NPU或GPU的策略之间进行切换的策略。

entities.name: ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_CALLBACK
entities.description: Callback function to be called for all activity notifications.

entities.name: GetActivityCoordinatorPolicyResourceCondition
entities.description: Retrieves the resource condition policy for an activity coordinator.

entities.name: IsActivityCoordinatorResourceSupported
entities.description: Determines if a specific resource type is supported by the Activity Coordinator.

entities.name: SetActivityCoordinatorPolicyResourceCondition
entities.description: Sets the required resource conditions for an activity coordinator policy.

entities.name: SubscribeActivityCoordinatorPolicy
entities.description: Creates a subscription that delivers coordination notifications to the provided callback according to the policy configuration. When notifications are received, the provided callback is executed with the provided context. Notifications with current state are delivered immediately on a separate thread and may be delivered before this call returns. Changes made to the policy after subscription do not affect the subscription. A single policy can be used to create multiple subscriptions with unique policy configurations. Notifications are serialized.

entities.name: CreateActivityCoordinatorPolicy
entities.description: Creates a new activity coordinator policy and pre-populates its fields based on the provided policy template enumeration. Policies created by this function must be destroyed using DestroyActivityCoordinatorPolicy.
entities.syntax: HRESULT CreateActivityCoordinatorPolicy(_In_ ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_POLICY_TEMPLATE PolicyTemplate, _Out_ ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_POLICY_HANDLE* Policy);

entities.name: ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_POLICY
entities.description: Represents an activity coordinator policy structure. Contains policy handle, resource and condition information.

parameters.name: policyTemplate
parameters.description: 提供策略模板枚举值。 policy 提供指向接收所创建策略句柄 的ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_POLICY 句柄的指针。

entities.remarks: 调用方应订阅策略以使用 SubscribeActivityCoordinatorPolicy 接收协调通知。 当不再需 要时，调用方应使用 DestroyActivityCoordinatorPolicy 销毁策略。

entities.name: DestroyActivityCoordinatorPolicy
entities.description: 销毁通过 CreateActivityCoordinatorPolicy 创建的活动协调器策略

entities.name: GetActivityCoordinatorPolicyResourceC
entities.description: 获取策略的资源所需条件。策略中未监视的资源由Activity Coordinator管理

entities.name: IsActivityCoordinatorResourceSupporte
entities.description: 此函数允许应用在运行时检查受支持的资源。 某些资源类型（例如神经处理单元 (NPU) 资源）可能并非在所有系统上都受支持。

entities.name: SetActivityCoordinatorPolicyResourceCo
entities.description: 为策略设置资源的所需条件。对于开发人员不希望其策略监视的资源，他们可以将资源的条件设置为特定值。

entities.name: ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_SUBSCRIPTION
entities.description: Represents a subscription handle for activity coordinator notifications. Parameters: policy provides a handle to the target policy, callback specifies the routine to execute for all coordination notifications in this subscription, callbackContext provides context to pass to the callback routine, subscription receives a pointer to the created subscription handle.
entities.remarks: 注意 请勿在此回调中执行活动，因为它将阻止此订阅的未来策略通知的传递。 应使用此回调来协调活动的启动和停止，以响应来自 API 的 RUN/STOP 通知。 注意 请勿长时间阻止此回调，因为它会阻止 UnsubscribeActivityCoordinatorPolicy，并可能导致线程池耗尽。 注意 从此回调调用 UnsubscribeActivityCoordinatorPolicy 将失败。 取消订阅必须在 回调外部发生。

entities.name: UnsubscribeActivityCoordinatorPolicy
entities.description: 销毁订阅。请注意，此例程在完成之前会等待任何正在进行的回调返回。注意：请勿从其订阅的回调调用例程，这样做将使程序崩溃。

entities.name: ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_CONDITION_GOOD
entities.description: ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_CONDITION_NOT_SET, ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_CONDITION_MEDIUM, ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_CONDITION_GOOD

entities.name: ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_CONDITION_MEDIUM
entities.description: Activity coordinator condition indicating medium resource availability

entities.name: ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_NOTIFICATIO
entities.description: 枚举类型，定义活动协调器订阅回调的可能通知类型

entities.name: ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_NOTIFICATION_RUN
entities.description: 指示满足策略的条件，并且现在可以启动或恢复关联的活动。

entities.name: ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_POLICY_TEMP
entities.description: 枚举类型 (activitycoordinatortypes.h)，表示支持的模板策略集。这些模板涵盖大多数活动的需求，但开发人员应根据需要自定义其策略，以确保为其活动正确配置所有资源。

entities.name: ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_POLICY_TEMPLATE_GOOD
entities.description: 使用此策略运行的活动不太可能干扰大多数用户体验和系统性能，前提是未使用未配置的资源。

entities.name: ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_POLICY_TEMPLATE_BASE
entities.description: 此模板表示建议的最低资源条件。 这有助于确保活动至少不会严重降低所有活动所需的最常见资源的大多数用户体验和系统性能。

entities.name: ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_POLICY_TEMPLATE_EMPTY
entities.description: Empty policy template for Activity Coordinator
entities.remarks: Important: Template configurations are provided for reference only. Updates may occur in the future to accommodate new workflows and system configurations, but will maintain backward compatibility.

entities.name: ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_POLICY_TEMPLATE_MEDIUM
entities.description: Activity Coordinator policy template for medium resource usage

entities.name: ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_RESOURCE_POWER
entities.description: Resource type constant indicating power resource coordination

entities.name: ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_RESOURCE_MEMORY
entities.description: 标识活动协调器(Activity Coordinator)资源类型为内存的常量

entities.name: ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_RESOURCE_SYSTEM_DISK
entities.description: 表示系统的当前系统磁盘状态。系统磁盘是指安装操作系统的驱动器。

entities.name: ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_RESOURCE_GPU
entities.description: GPU resource type for activity coordinator

entities.name: ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_RESOURCE_USER_IDLE
entities.description: 标识用户与设备交互的活跃状态，用于评估活动干扰的可能性。

entities.name: ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_RESOURCE_NETWORK
entities.description: 标识系统网络状态的资源类型常量

entities.name: ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_RESOURCE_CPU
entities.description: 标识系统当前CPU状态的常量

entities.name: ACTIVITY_COORDINATOR_RESOURCE_NPU
entities.description: 表示NPU(神经网络处理器)的可用性状态，包括NPU利用率信息
entities.remarks: 用于Activity Coordinator的资源条件信息

entities.name: USER_IDLE
entities.description: Indicates the system is in idle power state
